caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview for "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" and a black cap with headphones on. The setting appears to be a casual, possibly retail environment, as there are clothing racks and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged in conversation, occasionally looking off to the side, suggesting he might be interacting with someone off-camera. The overall atmosphere is relaxed and informal, typical of a podcast recording session.
